products.title: AFR-05 Forged Aluminum Wheels
products.bodyHtml:
Motorsport Oriented

Proceeding elegantly from the center, the 5 slender spokes gives a dynamic and light weight visual impression.  Matching the classic body line of the 992 Carrera S, iPE AFR-05 is the best choice for elevating performance and elegance.

The craftsmanship of AFR-05 is imponderous without sacrificing strength and safety. Wheel weight are reduced by 18.9 lbs (8.6kg) at the front and 23.8 lbs (10.8kg) at the rear (per wheel). It sets up an exciting chapter for iPE.

products.title: Audi A6 / A7 3.0T (C7/C7.5) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The Audi A6 / A7 3.0L TFSI quattro equipped with an iPE Innotech Performance Exhaust system awakens the sporty soul of anyone behind the steering wheel. Our Valvetronic exhaust system delivers both power and dynamic valve control to the driver's seat. The full system includes the remote capability to command 3 different modes: on, off, and auto. In on mode, the valves are fully open for maximum flow and power, releasing the pure sporty sound of the engine. In off mode, the valves are closed and volume is reduced for a comfortable cruise. The auto mode enables the system to detect the engine RPM and gas pedal signal to automatically adjust the valve movements for a dynamic driving experience.
Each part of the exhaust system is individually designed to perfectly fit to the Audi A6 / A7 3.0L TFSI quattro and to create a unique and breathtaking sound to break free from the ordinary.

All standard tips comes with chrome silver tips. Other colors are value-added.

WARNING - Please read these disclosures carefully prior to your installation!

1.Improper adjustments made during installation may result in short-term to permanent damages to the iPE exhaust system and/or your vehicle.
iPE will not be held responsible for any damages to the vehicle, and warranties on our products will be voided if the damages occurred due to improper installation.If you have any trouble installing the system please contact your authorized dealer!

products.title: Audi R8 V10 / V10 Performance Facelift Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
Product Description

Please confirm whether your vehicle is equipped with an OPF (Otto Particulate Filter) system before placing an order.

There is no denying that the Audi R8 V10 Performance makes every supercar enthusiast’s heart race. However, despite the incredible power of its naturally aspirated V10 engine, the sound of the factory exhaust system does not fully reflect the true character of the vehicle.

To unleash the full emotional experience of the V10 engine, the iPE engineering team accepted the challenge and developed a masterpiece designed to transform the R8 into a true automotive symphony.

With the precision craftsmanship of the valve-controlled iPE Innotech Performance Exhaust System, drivers can experience enhanced performance and a dramatic transformation in sound. The system delivers a deeper, more aggressive tone when the valves are open, while maintaining refined drivability when closed.

In addition, the lightweight construction contributes to reduced overall weight, resulting in improved driving dynamics and enhanced vehicle handling.

⚠️ Warning & Disclaimer

WARNING – Please read the following disclosures carefully before installation.

1. Installation Responsibility
Improper adjustments made during installation may result in temporary or permanent damage to the iPE exhaust system and/or the vehicle.
iPE will not be held responsible for any damage to the vehicle resulting from improper installation. Product warranties will be void if damage is caused by incorrect installation. If you encounter any difficulties during installation, please contact your authorized iPE dealer.

2. Liability Disclaimer
The manufacturer, importer, or dealer shall not be liable for any incidental damages, including personal injury or property damage, resulting from improper installation or operation of the iPE exhaust system.
During installation, ensure that the exhaust system does not come into contact with components sensitive to high temperatures.

3. Warranty Limitation
iPE makes no representation or warranty regarding damages caused by improper installation, misuse, or lack of maintenance of the exhaust system.
The warranty is limited to manufacturing defects recognized by our technical department under normal use conditions. Items subject to normal wear and tear (such as gaskets and sound-absorbing materials) are excluded.
The warranty will be void in cases of accidents, modifications, improper use, or use in racing/competition environments.

Additional Notice

Actual product may vary due to continuous product improvement. iPE reserves the right to revise, modify, or interpret product specifications without prior notice.

products.title: Audi RS3 Sedan / Sportback (8V.2) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
*Please confirm whether your car has an “OPF system” before placing an order.

Minimum weight and maximum sound are the name of the game. Our exhaust system consists of our trademark Valvetronic muffler with tips. We use the original actuators to control the valves. Our Audi RS3 8V exhaust is a super lightweight.The iPE exhaust offers plenty of advantages. Improved handling thanks to the much lighter rear end of the car, as well as increased performance.
The exhaust valves make it possible to improve both torque and horsepower, while the muffler internals were designed to specifically attack power gains and create our trademark F1 sound. iPE is famous for performance and F1 sound at its finest. The new lightweight exhaust for Audi RS3 8V opens up entirely new worlds. Any passionate driver who looks for that extra-kick should consider refining his car with an exhaust of the new exhaust of iPE.

All standard tips comes with chrome-black tips. Other colors are value-added.

Minimum weight and maximum sound are the name of the game. Our exhaust system consists of our trademark Valvetronic muffler with tips. We use the original actuators to control the valves. Our Audi RS4/RS5 B9 Avant exhaust is a super lightweight.The iPE exhaust offers plenty of advantages. Improved handling thanks to the much lighter rear end of the car, as well as increased performance.
The exhaust valves make it possible to improve both torque and horsepower, while the muffler internals were designed to specifically attack power gains and create our trademark F1 sound. iPE is famous for performance and F1 sound at its finest. The new lightweight exhaust for Audi RS4 opens up entirely new worlds. Any passionate driver who looks for that extra-kick should consider refining his car with an exhaust of the new exhaust of iPE.

products.title: Audi S3 Sedan / Sportback (8V) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The Audi S3 8V refined with an iPE Innotech Performance Exhaust system produces an extremely loud and aggressive sound as well as a comfortably quiet cruise by the push of a button when wished for. Our Valvetronic exhaust delivers both power and dynamic valve control to the driver's seat. The full system includes the remote capability to command 3 different modes: on, off, and auto. In on mode, the valves are fully open for maximum flow and power, releasing a unique and breathtaking sound. In off mode, the valves are closed and volume is reduced for a comfortable cruise. The auto mode enables the system to detect the engine RPM and gas pedal signal to automatically adjust the valve movements for a dynamic driving experience.
Each part of the exhaust system is individually designed to perfectly fit the Audi S3 8V. Our unique design overcomes the limits set by the stock exhaust, so that performance, sound, and driving pleasure can be increased dramatically.

products.title: Audi S4 3.0T (B8) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The Audi S4 3.0 TFSi equipped with an iPE Innotech Performance Exhaust system awakens the sporty soul of anyone behind the steering wheel. Our Valvetronic technology offers a dynamic system that delivers both power and dynamic valve control to the driver's seat. The remote control module delivers a 3 in 1 mode: on, off, and auto. In on mode, the valves are fully open for maximum flow and power, releasing the pure sporty sound of the engine. In off mode, the valves are closed and volume is reduced for a comfortable cruise. The auto mode enables the system to detect the engine RPM and gas pedal signal to automatically adjust the valve movements for a dynamic driving experience.
Each part of the exhaust system is individually designed to perfectly fit the Audi S4 3.0 TFSi and to create a unique and breathtaking sound to break free from the ordinary.

products.title: Lamborghini Aventador LP700-4 / LP720-4  (Titanium) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
F1 sound and everyday usability become one with iPE
The visionary and futuristic design is not the only remarkable feature of the Aventador LP 700-4 / 720-4. Also the extreme power of its refined V12 mid-engine places this vehicle directly at the forefront of modern supercar technology.
When stomping on the gas pedal, you will be rewarded with a breathtaking acceleration from 0-100 km/h in only 2.9 seconds and a top speed of 350 km/h. In combination with our Valvetronic exhaust system, the performance can even be upgraded by the means of unfolding the pure sound of a Lamborghini engine, whilst making its pure power visible in the form of blazing flames.
Our exhaust system is a true masterpiece and handcrafted with the highest precision. In comparison to the stock exhaust system, the iPE Innotech Valvetronic system offers performance increase while significantly reducing weight. At the low speed range, our system delivers a deeper and more full-bodied sound. Once rpm increases, the distinctive “BANGING” sound of the twelve-cylinder comes to life, creating an unique sound experience which makes the heart of each automobile fan skip a beat.

products.title: BMW 320i / 325i / 330i (G20) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The iPE Exhaust system for the BMW 320i / 325i / 330i (G20) is designed and engineered to enhance gas flow and maximize performance gain. With 23.7HP and 21.3Nm of torque increase, there are significant improvements on throttle responsiveness and smoother power band throughout the rev range. Highlighting the mean tone from its i4 engine. This iPE exhaust system is handcrafted with T304 Stainless Steel throughout the entire system reducing weight by 32%(-8.2kg).

iPE Valvetronic system for the BMW 320i / 325i / 330i (G20) allows users to adjust the exhaust note through OBD II Hand Gesture Control Sensor, Bluetooth Remote Control Module or OEM Valve operation. Furthermore, we also offer various motorsport-inspired exhaust tip upgrade options.

WARNING - Prior to purchase, please confirm if your vehicle is an OPF version. Thank you.
Full Exhaust system:
Downpipe (Optional):
- 200 cell downpipe
- Catless downpipe

Catback Exhaust System:
1. Front pipe
2. Mid pipe
3. Valvetronic Muffler
4. Chrome Silver tips

Valvetronic Control system:
- OEM Valve operation
- Remote Control system
- Hand Gesture Control sensor (Optional)

Exhaust Tip Upgrade Options:
- Chrome Black tips
- Carbon Fiber tips
- Titanium Blue tips

WARNING DISCLOSURE - Please read carefully prior to installation!

1.Improper adjustments made during installation may result in short-term or permanent damages to the iPE exhaust system and/or your vehicle. Please note, iPE will not be responsible for any damages to the vehicle, and warranties on iPE product(s) will be voided if the damages occurred due to improper installation.The warranty will also be voided in case of accidents, modifications, improper or competition uses. If you have any questions regarding installing an iPE exhaust system please contact the iPE authorized dealer you purchased from.

2. The manufacturer, importer or dealer shall not be liable for any incidental damage including personal injury or any other damages caused by improper installation or operation of the iPE exhaust system. When installing the iPE exhaust system, please ensure that the exhaust system does not make contact with wires that might cause it to melt.

3. iPE Exhaust guarantees full warranty of iPE exhaust systems for a total period of 1 year – starting from the date of purchase noted on the invoice. (Warranty is only applicable to exhaust systems purchased via iPE or iPE authorized dealers.)

All electronic components – 1 Year Warranty.

iPE 200 Cell High Flow Sport Cat Pipes – 1 Year Warranty.

Cat-bypass Pipes (Catless) - We recommend an ECU tune as we will NOT provide warranty for CEL (Check Engine Light) when changing to Cat-bypass Pipes.

iPE Exhaust Tips - We highly recommend users, DO NOT wash with strong acid and strong based organic solvent.

Warranties are non-transferable.

Warranty is limited to an exchange or repair of the defective part, full system will not be replaced unless required.

Warranty will not be applicable if the iPE exhaust system is purchased in a country where iPE is not authorized.

For more information regarding iPE warranty policy:
https://ipeofficial.com/pages/returns-warranty

The M2 Competition (F87N), which replaces the regular M2 which is a an exquisite high-performance car and has been endowed with a version of the twin-turbo six-cylinder from the M3 and M4(F8X).

The sound however, we felt was a little on the timid side, and did not reflect the potential of his S55 engine with passion, here is a snapshot of sound-check for you guys.

products.title: BMW M340i / xDrive (G20/G21) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
*Please confirm whether your car has an “OPF system” before placing an order.

The BMW 3 Series adopts a new EfficientLightweight body structure, which can increase body rigidity by 25% and enhance key components by 50%.
The front suspension tower, engine auxiliary beam and hood are all replaced with aluminum alloy. With other details, the weight of the whole car is 55 kg lighter than the previous generation.
In addition, the wheelbase is longer and the tire grip area is larger. BMW always maintains a 50:50 weight. The BMW G20 / G21 is definitely a good car worth have. However the M340i is too mild in terms of exhaust noise. This is not to say that the 3.0-liter TwinPower Turbo and 374hp/51kgm are not enough, but the 840i and GR Supra are also equipped with the same B58 engine, they sound so fierce and exciting, and the M340i sounds without personality. In fact, the exhaust sound is tamed or mad, which is more affected by the ECU adjustment, and the exhaust system will only make the effect more obvious. The catalyst for this car is a 200-cell Sportscat. If you choose no cat, the fuel content in the exhaust gas will increase, which will make it easy for the exhaust gas to make interesting sounds, such as POP&Crack.

products.title: BMW M5 (G90/G99) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The all-new BMW G90/G99 M5, a fusion of electrified performance and traditional M-bred muscle, now gains an unmistakable edge with the iPE exhaust system. Engineered for those who demand precision, power, and presence, our system redefines the auditory signature of BMW’s next-generation super sedan.

At iPE, our mission is to elevate every driving experience by shaping sound into emotion. With the G90/G99 M5's hybrid powertrain as our canvas, we've crafted an exhaust that delivers a bold, resonant tone under acceleration, yet maintains elegance and composure at cruising speeds. At the heart of this system lies our all-new Double Crossed X-Pipe design, developed to balance exhaust gas flow, reduce unwanted drone, and enrich the exhaust note with a deeper, fuller tone. The result is a more immersive and exhilarating drive—refined for comfort, yet brimming with passion.

Each component is meticulously designed for seamless integration with the M5’s advanced architecture, ensuring optimal performance without compromise.

The result is a rich, commanding exhaust note that reflects the M5's dual nature—luxury and aggression in perfect harmony. Whether carving through mountain passes or commanding attention on city streets, the iPE system gives drivers a deeper connection to their machine—and a distinctive voice that stands apart from the crowd.

iPE Valvetronic system for the BMW X3M / X4M allows users to adjust the exhaust note through OEM Valve operation. Furthermore, we also offer various motorsport-inspired exhaust tip upgrade options.


WARNING - Prior to purchase, please confirm if your vehicle is an OPF version. Thank you.



BMW X3M / X4M (F97 / F98) Exhaust System Product Details

products.title: BMW X5 / X6 40i (G05/G06) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
*Please confirm whether your car has an “OPF system” before placing an order.

Our system for the BMW G05 X5 valve is controlled by our OBDII device and Lighting sensor.

It is a testament to our philosophy of the ultimate union of comfort and performance experience for the driver and passengers.
When the valves are fully open for maximum flow and power, it creates an exotic tone and allows for high performance. When the valves are closed, volume is reduced for a more low-profile comfortable drive. With our latest technology, just one click on the remote control will setup any rpm to automatic mode. The automatic mode enables the system to detect the engine RPM to intelligently switch comfort/racing exhaust profiles. Users can also opt to simply switch valve on/off mode as desired by remote control when driving.

If you have any trouble installing the system please contact your authorized dealer immediately.

All standard tips comes with chrome silver tips. Other colors are value-added.

*WARNING - Please read these disclosures carefully prior to your installation!

1.Improper adjustments made during installation may result in short-term to permanent damages to the iPE exhaust system and/or your vehicle. iPE will not be held responsible for any damages to the vehicle, and warranties on our products will be voided if the damages occurred due to improper installation.If you have any trouble installing the system please contact your authorized dealer!

2. The manufacturer, importer or dealer shall not be liable for any incidental damage including personal injury or any other damages caused by improper installation or operation of the iPE exhaust system. When installing the iPE exhaust system be careful that the exhaust system does not touch other parts sensitive to high temperature.

3. iPE makes no representation or warranties with regard to damage caused by the improper installation, use and maintenance of the iPE exhaust system. The warranty is limited to defects recognized by our technical department and of normal use only, and excludes items subject to normal wear and tear(gaskets and damping wool). The warranty is voided in case of accidents, modifications, improper or competition uses.

Actual product may vary due to product enhancement. iPE reserves the right to revise, change, explain the product.

products.title: BMW X5M / X6M (F95 / F96) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
BMW X5M / X6M (F95 / F96) Exhaust System Product Description



The iPE Exhaust system for the BMW X5M / X6M (F95/F96) is designed and engineered to enhance gas flow and maximize performance gain. Highlighting the brutal exhaust note from its 4.4L V8 Twin Turbo engine. This iPE exhaust system is handcrafted with T304 Stainless Steel throughout the Catback system to reduce weight by 1.6% (-4.2kg).

iPE Valvetronic system for the BMW X5M / X6M (F95/F96) allows users to adjust the exhaust note through OBD II Hand Gesture Control Sensor, Bluetooth Remote Control Module or OEM Valve operation. Furthermore, we also offer various motorsport-inspired exhaust tip upgrade options.



WARNING - Prior to purchase, please confirm if your vehicle is an OPF version. Thank you.



BMW X5M / X6M (F95 / F96) Exhaust System Product Details



Catback Exhaust system:

▶ Catback Exhaust System:
    1. Front pipe
    2. Mid pipe - 1
    3. Mid pipe - 2

products.title: Ferrari 296 GTB Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
Ferrari 296 GTB Exhaust System Product Description

The iPE exhaust system for the Ferrari 296 GTB is crafted from T304 stainless steel, matching OEM standards while enhancing performance and sound. This system includes both the catalytic converter and valvetronic components, reducing weight by 14.7% (2.75kg).

 

Ferrari 296 GTB Exhaust System Exhaust system product details

▶ Catted Downpipe :
▸ Catted Downpipe

▸ Stainless Steel Heat Shield
 
▶ Catless Downpipe:

▸ Catless Downpipe

▸ Stainless Steel Heat Shield
▶ Stainless steel Back System:

▸ Electric Valvetronic Muffler

▸Stainless Steel Heat Shield

▶Titanium Cat Back System

▸ Electric Valvetronic Muffler

▸Stainless Steel Heat Shield

 

※This model is remain with factory exhaust valve system

※This model reused factory muffler outlet pipe and tips

※Please confirm OPF/Non OPF version before placing an order

products.title: Ferrari 360 Modena / Spider Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The Ferrari 360 Modena / Spider in combination with an iPE Innotech Performance Exhaust system excel in every imaginable aspect. Our aim is to improve the nearly perfect by giving it that certain something. Our outstanding design and precise handcrafted work refine all facets of the exhaust sound. The most remarkable aspect is the clean tone at all rpm ranges, which underlines the characteristics of the Ferrari 360 Modena / Spider.
The remote control module and our Valvetronic exhaust let you enjoy phenomenal F1 sound, but at the same time also make it possible to shut down any vibration or drone frequencies in the interior when wished for, in order to enable an undisturbed conversation and comfortable drive.

All standard tips comes with chrome silver tips. Other colors are value-added.

WARNING - Please read these disclosures carefully prior to your installation!

1.Improper adjustments made during installation may result in short-term to permanent damages to the iPE exhaust system and/or your vehicle.
iPE will not be held responsible for any damages to the vehicle, and warranties on our products will be voided if the damages occurred due to improper installation.If you have any trouble installing the system please contact your authorized dealer!

2. The manufacturer, importer or dealer shall not be liable for any incidental damage including personal injury or any other damages caused by improper installation or operation of the iPE exhaust system. When installing the iPE exhaust system be careful that the exhaust system does not touch other parts sensitive to high temperature.

3. iPE makes no representation or warranties with regard to damage caused by the improper installation, use and maintenance of the iPE exhaust system. The warranty is limited to defects recognized by our technical department and of normal use only, and excludes items subject to normal wear and tear(gaskets and damping wool). The warranty is voided in case of accidents, modifications, improper or competition uses.

Actual product may vary due to product enhancement. iPE reserves the right to revise, change, explain the product.

products.title: Ferrari 458 Italia / Spider Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The timeless beauty of the Ferrari 458 Italia / Spider from Bella Italia is undeniable. In combination with our F1 Exhaust system, horsepower and torque can be increased significantly. Moreover, our choice of material, refined design, and dedication to detail all add up to the incomparable racing sound of iPE.
Our high end exhaust system consists of a set of headers, a Valvetronic muffler, and a dual exit system, which produces a lower sound at the low speed range, while it impresses with pure racing sound at high rpm.

*Materials

Here at iPE Exhaust we believe in the absolute best materials for every application, chosen
environment friendly by the Sandblasting 304 properties on our catback system. For the
Sand-blasting exhaust boutique, of course we also offer 304 stainless steel as an
alternative on other products. Every material has its own perfect application based on
weight, strength, heat resistance, and chemical stability.


Sand-blasting


We have developed our own proprietary for the enviroment friendly usage. Adding a layer of
sand to our catback system will reduce heat soak, and the same strength, heat resistance,
and chemical stability as the stainless steel.

All standard tips comes with chrome silver tips. Other colors are value-added.

WARNING - Please read these disclosures carefully prior to your installation!

1.Improper adjustments made during installation may result in short-term to permanent damages to the iPE exhaust system and/or your vehicle.
iPE will not be held responsible for any damages to the vehicle, and warranties on our products will be voided if the damages occurred due to improper installation.If you have any trouble installing the system please contact your authorized dealer!

2. The manufacturer, importer or dealer shall not be liable for any incidental damage including personal injury or any other damages caused by improper installation or operation of the iPE exhaust system. When installing the iPE exhaust system be careful that the exhaust system does not touch other parts sensitive to high temperature.

3. iPE makes no representation or warranties with regard to damage caused by the improper installation, use and maintenance of the iPE exhaust system. The warranty is limited to defects recognized by our technical department and of normal use only, and excludes items subject to normal wear and tear(gaskets and damping wool). The warranty is voided in case of accidents, modifications, improper or competition uses.

Actual product may vary due to product enhancement. iPE reserves the right to revise, change, explain the product.
*Cat Pipe/Cat-bypass Pipe section ONLY fit with iPE Catback System

products.title: Ferrari GTC4Lusso T Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
*Please confirm whether your car has an “OPF system” before placing an order.

The Ferrari GTC 4Lusso T combined with an iPE system, excels in every imaginable aspect with extremely loud and aggressive high pitch like sounds for anyone behind the steering wheel who is searching for a spirited driving experience. Our aim is to bring back the Italian supercar character by giving it that certain tone. We accepted this challenge and created our own masterpiece in order to make the V8 sound like a racing automobile symphony. Our outstanding design with precision craftsmanship has refine all aspects of the exhaust sound. The most significant feature is the deep rumble from idle at low revs through to high pitch F1 excitement at mid-range then to intense high growling sound at high revs ranges, with some burbles when lifting off the throttle which emphasises the characteristics of that trademark V8 growl.
With the Ferrari V8 engine design, we started off with a 200 cell high-flow sport catalysts down pipe to further increase flow efficiency however at the same time being environmentally conscious, in addition prevent any check engine light, and then flow through our uniquely designed X-pipe in order to maintain a smoother cleaner louder tone to maintain that automobile symphony.

All standard tips comes with chrome silver tips. Other colors are value-added.

products.title: Ferrari Roma Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
Silent elegance—until it unleashes.

The Ferrari Roma isn’t just a modern GT; it is the embodiment of Italian sophistication fused with raw performance.
iPE’s bespoke performance exhaust system is engineered to unlock the full character of the Roma’s 3.9L twin-turbo V8 engine. From its refined idle to an emotionally charged high-RPM scream, every note is amplified with clarity, depth, and unmistakable identity.

Crafted from premium stainless steel, the system maintains lightweight integrity and durability, while 999 pure gold heat shielding is applied to critical thermal zones—combining visual prestige with superior heat management. Whether cruising through the city or accelerating into the redline, the system brings out the Roma’s true driving soul.

Key Features:

  • High-flow exhaust architecture enhances turbo response and mid-to-high RPM power

  • Intelligent valvetronic system allows adaptive sound profiles across drive modes

  • 999 pure gold heat shields provide thermal efficiency and visual distinction

  • Direct bolt-on fitment with OEM mounting points – seamless upgrade

Redefine the voice of Roma.
iPE – where sound inspires performance.

products.title: Ford Mustang EcoBoost 2.3T Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
*The Ford Mustang Ecoboost MK6 "2019" model won't fit with iPE cat pipe, but it is available with iPE catback system.

*Please confirm whether your car has an “OPF system” before placing an order.

The Ford Mustang 2.3L EcoBoost refined with an iPE Innotech Performance Exhaust system produces an extremely loud and aggressive sound as well as a comfortably quiet cruise by the push of a button when wished for. Our Valvetronic exhaust delivers both power and dynamic valve control to the driver's seat.The full system includes the remote capability to command 3 different modes: on, off, and auto. In on mode, the valves are fully open for maximum flow and power, releasing a unique and breathtaking sound. In off mode, the valves are closed and volume is reduced for a comfortable cruise. The auto mode enables the system to detect the engine RPM and gas pedal signal to automatically adjust the valve movements for a dynamic driving experience.
Our Ford Mustang 2.3L exhaust is a with only 22.93 kg. That is a weight reduction of 32% to the original weight of the stock exhaust with 33.03 kg: a weight saving of 10.07 kg!

*Material

Here at iPE Exhaust we believe in the absolute best materials for every application, chosen
environment friendly by the Sandblasting 304 properties on our catback system. For the
Sand-blasting exhaust boutique, of course we also offer 304 stainless steel as an
alternative on other products. Every material has its own perfect application based on
weight, strength, heat resistance, and chemical stability.


Sand-blasting


We have developed our own proprietary for the enviroment friendly usage. Adding a layer of
sand to our catback system will reduce heat soak, and the same strength, heat resistance,
and chemical stability as the stainless steel.

All standard tips comes with chrome silver tips. Other colors are value-added.

products.title: MFR-01 Magnesium Wheels
products.bodyHtml:
Introducing the MFR-01 Forged Magnesium Racing Wheels. It’s designed especially for the race track and manufactured with the highest standards.

Ultra-Lightweight

Design for track usage. With the engineering design process and revolutionary technology, the MFR-01 manages to weight in at only 15.2 lbs / 6.9kg for 20 x 9.5 inches. It offers ~35% weight reduction over aluminum factory wheels and it’s also lighter than OEM magnesium wheels. The benefit of lightweight wheels is to reduce unsprung mass and improve vehicles' performance capability.



Forged Magnesium

Magnesium is the lightest structural metal available by far and it shows lower density, higher specific strength and exceptional machinability.

  • 30% lighter than forged aluminum by volume

  • 12% specific strength* stronger than aluminum

  • High damping capacity

  • Eco-friendly and recyclable


Born to Race

Magnesium wheels are usually applied to race cars, and it can reduce unsprung mass, shorter braking distance, faster acceleration, and improve overall performance.

  • Unsprung mass deduction

  • Shock absorption for better handling

  • High thermal conductivity to prolonging life of brake system

  • Better fuel efficiency



World-Leading Manufacturing Process

  • 10,000-Tons Forging Press

  • Hot Flow Forming

  • Heat Treatment

  • CNC Turning

  • CNC Milling

  • Polish & Grinding

  • Micro-Arc Oxidation(MAO)

  • Electro-Deposition Coating (ED)


Certified Strength

The MFR-01 is able to reduce weight without sacrificing its strength and safety. iPE forged magnesium racing wheels went through rigorous tests under the strictest standards. Every step is aimed to guarantee quality and safety for consumers.

  • CAE Simulations

  • Radial Fatigue Tests

  • Rotary Fatigue Tests

  • Impact Fatigue Tests


OE Cap Ready for：

  • Porsche 991 GT2 RS

  • Porsche 991.1 991.2 GT3 RS


Aggressive Offset Applications：

  • Porsche 991.1 991.2 GT3/ 991.2 GT3 Touring

  • Porsche 991.2 Speedster

  • Porsche 911 R

  • Porsche 991.2 GTS/ GTS Cabriolet/ Carrera 4 GTS/ Targa 4 GTS

  • Porsche 991.2 Turbo/ Turbo S


{{end_tab_description}}

products.title: Lamborghini Aventador LP700-4 / LP720-4 Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
F1 sound and everyday usability become one with iPE
The visionary and futuristic design is not the only remarkable feature of the Aventador LP 700-4 / 720-4. Also the extreme power of its refined V12 mid-engine places this vehicle directly at the forefront of modern supercar technology.
When stomping on the gas pedal, you will be rewarded with a breathtaking acceleration from 0-100 km/h in only 2.9 seconds and a top speed of 350 km/h. In combination with our Valvetronic exhaust system, the performance can even be upgraded by the means of unfolding the pure sound of a Lamborghini engine, whilst making its pure power visible in the form of blazing flames.
Our exhaust system is a true masterpiece and handcrafted with the highest precision. In comparison to the stock exhaust system, the iPE Innotech Valvetronic system offers performance increase while significantly reducing weight. At the low speed range, our system delivers a deeper and more full-bodied sound. Once rpm increases, the distinctive “BANGING” sound of the twelve-cylinder comes to life, creating an unique sound experience which makes the heart of each automobile fan skip a beat.

products.bodyHtml:
The iPE Exhaust system for the Lamborghini Huracan EVO is designed and engineered to enhance gas flow and maximize performance gain. Highlighting the beautiful symphony from its naturally aspirated V10 engine. This iPE exhaust system is handcrafted with T304 Stainless Steel throughout the Catback system. 


iPE Valvetronic system for the Lamborghini Huracan EVO allows users to adjust the exhaust note via OBD II Hand Gesture Control Sensor, Bluetooth Remote Control Module or OEM Valve operation. Furthermore, we also offer various motorsport-inspired exhaust tip upgrade options.

products.title: Lamborghini Revuelto Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The Lamborghini Revuelto marks a bold evolution in supercar engineering—an electrified V12 masterpiece that fuses brutal performance with cutting-edge hybrid innovation. To match this leap forward, iPE introduces an exhaust system that transforms every drive into a symphony of raw emotion and mechanical precision.

At iPE, we don’t just build exhausts—we sculpt soundscapes. For the Revuelto, we’ve engineered a system that amplifies the car’s naturally aspirated soul while embracing the high-voltage intensity of its hybrid DNA. Under throttle, the iPE system delivers an aggressive, spine-tingling crescendo that pays homage to Lamborghini’s racing heritage. At idle and cruising speeds, it offers a refined, resonant tone that respects the car’s luxurious pedigree.

Each component is crafted from ultra-lightweight titanium and engineered to integrate flawlessly with the Revuelto’s complex architecture. The result: enhanced power delivery, reduced weight, and a visceral soundtrack that turns every gear change into a moment of drama.

The iPE exhaust for the Lamborghini Revuelto doesn’t just complement the car—it completes it. For drivers who demand more than just performance—for those who crave presence, emotion, and an unmistakable voice—this is the system that defines the future of driving exhilaration.

products.bodyHtml:

products.title: Mercedes-Benz A250 (W176) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The Mercedes-Benz A250 refined with an iPE Innotech Performance Exhaust system produces an extremely loud and aggressive sound as well as a comfortably quiet cruise by the push of a button when wished for. Our Valvetronic exhaust delivers both power and dynamic valve control to the driver's seat. The full system includes the remote capability to command 3 different modes: on, off, and auto. In on mode, the valves are fully open for maximum flow and power, releasing a unique and breathtaking sound. In off mode, the valves are closed and volume is reduced for a comfortable cruise. The auto mode enables the system to detect the engine RPM and gas pedal signal to automatically adjust the valve movements for a dynamic driving experience.
Each part of the exhaust system is individually designed to perfectly fit the A250. The iPE exhaust is 6.66 kg lighter than stock, which translates to an 25% weight reduction. Our unique design overcomes the limits set by the stock exhaust, so that performance, sound, and driving pleasure can be increased dramatically.

products.title: Mercedes-Benz AMG A35 (W177) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The stock exhaust system of Mercedes-AMG A35 uses OPF gasoline particulate filter and a catalyst converter, so the sound and audio are restricted. Although, cancelling OPF can obviously increase the volume and make the sound more "exciting", it also caused the risk of warning from Engine Check Light.

Furthermore, our OBDII valve control system can control the timing of valve opening by itself, and force the valve to maintain the state of "open" or "closed". However, it is also feasible to use the original valve control system, but it is impossible to control the timing of valve opening and closing, and it may cause side effects of resonance due to the original valve opening angle of the control valve.

products.bodyHtml:
Mercedes-AMG A45/A45S W177 is equipped with the latest 2.0-liter four-cylinder turbo engine, which has powerful power of 387ps and 421ps respectively. The entire car series is equipped with a 4Matic four-wheel drive system as standard, Among them, A45S is more can be switched to a drift model with rear-wheel drive. The auto mode enables the system to detect the engine RPM and gas pedal signal to automatically adjust the valve movements for a dynamic driving experience.
Each part of the exhaust system is individually designed to perfectly fit the AMG CLA45. The iPE exhaust is 2.53 kg lighter than stock, which translates to an 11.6% weight reduction. Our unique design overcomes the limits set by the stock exhaust, so that performance, sound, and driving pleasure can be increased dramatically.

products.title: Mercedes-Benz AMG CLE53 (A236/C236) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
Crafted for the new generation of AMG – engineered sound and uncompromising performance.

Specifically developed for the Mercedes-AMG CLE53 Cabriolet (A236) and Coupe (C236), the iPE Performance Exhaust System unleashes the full potential of the 3.0L inline-six turbocharged engine. Featuring a high-flow architecture and intelligent valve control, this system offers seamless transitions between refined cruising and exhilarating roar—perfectly matching the driver’s intent.

Constructed from premium-grade stainless steel, the system is further enhanced with 999 pure gold heat shielding on key thermal zones. This not only minimizes heat soak and protects surrounding components, but also serves as a hallmark of performance luxury and thermal excellence.

Key Features:

  • Optimized flow design for improved turbo response and mid-to-high RPM performance

  • Active valve system adapts sound and backpressure based on driving mode

  • 999 pure gold heat shields applied to high-temperature areas for superior thermal management

  • Direct-fit installation with no modifications required

Unleash the true sound of AMG – where performance meets precision acoustics.

products.title: Mercedes-Benz AMG GT / GT S / GT C (C190/R190) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
On top of that, the Mercedes-AMG GT "S"Valves work like OEM valves on driver select, but GT works with iPE remote control .

The Mercedes-AMG GT S combined with iPE system, will generate a loud and aggressive growling sound for anyone behind the steering wheel who is searching for a spirited driving experience.Our aim was to improve the GT S by giving it that certain character for an all new sports car. We accepted this challenge and created our own masterpiece in order to make the GT S sound like a hardcore sports car from AMG.
Our outstanding design with precision craftsmanship has refine all aspects of the exhaust sound. The most significant feature is low deep growl at low revs through to intense thunderous rumbles at high revs. With the V8 biturbo engine design, we replaced the factory two pairs of severely restrictive catalysts pipes with our own single pair of 200 cell high-flow sport catalysts down pipes to significantly increase efficiency however at the same time being environmentally conscious, and prevent any check engine light, then through to our uniquely designed H-pipe in order to equalise exhaust pulses for both sides of the pipes, and to give that extra crackle, bang and popping sound when lift off acceleration, finally through to our uniquely designed valve controlled system with mufflers for that special V8 symphony.
Our full Valvetronic exhaust system delivers both enjoyable deep growling sound and factory like regulations, all accessible via the factory five drive modes from AMG Dynamic Select and Exhaust button. In Sport+ and Race mode, the valves are fully open for maximum sound and performance, travelling through the enlarged pipes to unleash a unique and breath-taking sound of deep growls in low revs to insanely thunderous rumbling sounds at high revs.
In Comfort and Sport mode, the valves are closed and the exhaust gases travels through the reduced pipes into the mufflers for a comfortable cruise through quiet neighbourhoods or for a passenger who has fallen asleep. Then the system detects engine RPM and throttle pedal signal to automatically adjust valve movements for an uninterrupted progressive driving experience, maintaining legal sound restrictions where applicable. Each part of the exhaust system is individually designed to perfectly fit onto the Mercedes-AMG GT S. To create a unique and breath-taking sound that will trickle those feelings and senses, sending them into your consciousness, giving you a bit of freedom away from the busy stressful working environment or for drivers who want a bit of attention grabbing sound.

products.title: Mercedes-Benz AMG GT / GT S / GT C (C190/R190) (Titanium) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The iPE Exhaust system for the Mercedes-Benz AMG GT / GT S / GT C is designed and engineered to enhance gas flow and maximize performance gain. Power and torque are increased by +18.9HP and +25.5 Nm throughout the entire rev range, making it more rapid and exciting to drive. iPE’s turbo-back system spotlights the extremely powerful rumble from its turbocharged 4.0 litre V8 engine when the valves are opened. This exhaust system is handcrafted with Gr.1 Titanium throughout the entire catback system to reduce weight by 57%(-14.81kg).

iPE Valvetronic system for the Mercedes-Benz AMG GT / GT S / GT C allows users to adjust the exhaust note through OEM Valve operation on the center console.

products.title: Mercedes-Benz AMG C63 (C204/W204/S204) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The iPE Exhaust system for the legendary Mercedes-Benz AMG C63 (C204/W204/S204) is designed and engineered to enhance gas flow and maximize performance gain, resulting in 34.9HP power bump and 41.16Nm of torque increase. Highlighting the thunderous sound from the M156 6.2 litre naturally aspirated V8 engine. This iPE exhaust system is handcrafted with T304 Stainless Steel from headers to mufflers to reduce weight by 45%(-25.75kg).

iPE Valvetronic system for the Mercedes-Benz AMG C63 (C204/W204/S204) allows users to adjust the exhaust note through OBD II Hand Gesture Control Sensor or Bluetooth Remote Control Module. Furthermore, we also offer various motorsport-inspired exhaust tip upgrade options.

Full Exhaust system:
Headers with Cat (Optional):
- Headers with 200 cell Cat pipe
- Headers with Cat-bypass pipe

Catback Exhaust System:
1. Mid pipe
2. Valvetronic Muffler
3. Chrome Silver tips

Valvetronic Control system:
- Remote Control system
- Hand Gesture Control sensor (Optional)

Exhaust Tip Upgrade Options:
- Chrome Black tips
- Titanium Blue tips

WARNING DISCLOSURE - Please read carefully prior to installation!

3. iPE Exhaust guarantees full warranty of iPE exhaust systems for a total period of 1 year – starting from the date of purchase noted on the invoice. (Warranty is only applicable to exhaust systems purchased via iPE or iPE authorized dealers.)

All electronic components – 1 Year Warranty.

iPE 200 Cell High Flow Sport Cat Pipes – 1 Year Warranty.

Cat-bypass Pipes (Catless) - We recommend an ECU tune as we will NOT provide warranty for CEL (Check Engine Light) when changing to Cat-bypass Pipes.

iPE Exhaust Tips - We highly recommend users, DO NOT wash with strong acid and strong based organic solvent.

Warranties are non-transferable.

products.title: Mercedes-Benz AMG E53 (C238) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The Mercedes-AMG E53 (C238) uses the 3.0L L6 Turbo engine(M256). The original Sport+ mode will already fire the POP Sound when it is upshifted. The iPE not only makes it more obvious, but also doesn’t require changing the ECU. The iPE exhaust system can produce firecrackers sound at throttle.

Although the electronic valve of iPE can work with the OEM control system, since the cooperative vehicle we developed E53 C238 was a low-profile version without an electronic motor, E53 temporarily only supplies vacuum-type automatic valves that are opened and closed by exhaust pressure. Because the original valve opening at 1300~1500rpm.Such an early opening time is easy to produce disturbances due to the increased pipe diameter and high flow design to resonance.

Therefore, we extremely recommend to choose the OBDii with Lighting Sensor, which can not only quickly switch the three modes of OPEN, AUTO, and CLOSE in 1 second, but also freely set the valve opening timing within 4000 rpm. Therefore, iPE's CLOSE + original Comfort Mode can bring you peace like OEM E53. And iPE's OPEN + original Sport Plus Mode can provide you with a lot of fun listening experience

products.title: MFF-01 Magnesium Wheels
products.bodyHtml:
Forged Magnesium

Magnesium is the lightest structural metal available by far and it shows lower density, higher specific strength and exceptional machinability.

  • 30% lighter than forged aluminum by volume

  • 12% specific strength* stronger than aluminum

  • High damping capacity

  • Eco-friendly and recyclable


Innovation

Magnesium wheels are usually applied to race cars, and it can reduce unsprung mass, shorter braking distance, faster acceleration, and improve overall performance.

  • Unsprung mass deduction

  • Shock absorption for better handling

  • High thermal conductivity to prolonging life of brake system

  • Better fuel efficiency






World-Leading Manufacturing Process

  • 10,000-Tons Forging Press

  • Hot Flow Forming

  • Heat Treatment

  • CNC Turning

  • CNC Milling

  • Polish & Grinding

  • Micro-Arc Oxidation(MAO)

 

 




Certified Strength

Every process for the MFR-04 is critical in order to produce the highest standard quality wheels. Under strong and safety condition, iPE provides ideal products for the consumers.

  • Radial Fatigue Tests

  • Rotary Fatigue Tests

  • Impact Fatigue Tests

products.title: MFP-04 Magnesium Wheels
products.bodyHtml:
F1 Lightweight Technology in Reality. 


Lighter yet Stronger

Design for track usage. The craftsmanship of MFP-04 is imponderous without sacrificing strength and safety. It weights in front at just 16.3 lbs / 7.4kg, rear at 21 lbs / 9.5 kg. It sets up an exciting chapter for iPE.


Forged Magnesium

Magnesium is the lightest structural metal available by far and it shows lower density, higher specific strength and exceptional machinability.

  • 30% lighter than forged aluminum by volume

  • 12% specific strength* stronger than aluminum

  • High damping capacity

  • Eco-friendly and recyclable





Innovation

Magnesium wheels are usually applied to race cars, and it can reduce unsprung mass, shorter braking distance, faster acceleration, and improve overall performance.

  • Unsprung mass deduction

  • Shock absorption for better handling

  • High thermal conductivity to prolonging life of brake system

  • Better fuel efficiency



World-Leading Manufacturing Process

  • 10,000-Tons Forging Press

  • Hot Flow Forming

  • Heat Treatment

  • CNC Turning

  • CNC Milling

  • Polish & Grinding

  • Micro-Arc Oxidation(MAO)


Certified Strength

Every process for the MFP-02 is critical in order to produce the highest standard quality wheels. Under strong and safety condition, iPE provides ideal products for the consumers.

  • Radial Fatigue Tests

  • Rotary Fatigue Tests

  • Impact Fatigue Tests




{{end_tab_description}}

products.title: MFV-03 Magnesium Wheels
products.bodyHtml:
F1 Lightweight Technology in Reality. 


Forged Magnesium

Magnesium is the lightest structural metal available by far and it shows lower density, higher specific strength and exceptional machinability.

  • 30% lighter than forged aluminum by volume

  • 12% specific strength* stronger than aluminum

  • High damping capacity

  • Eco-friendly and recyclable





Innovation

Magnesium wheels are usually applied to race cars, and it can reduce unsprung mass, shorter braking distance, faster acceleration, and improve overall performance.

  • Unsprung mass deduction

  • Shock absorption for better handling

  • High thermal conductivity to prolonging life of brake system

  • Better fuel efficiency



World-Leading Manufacturing Process

  • 10,000-Tons Forging Press

  • Hot Flow Forming

  • Heat Treatment

  • CNC Turning

  • CNC Milling

  • Polish & Grinding

  • Micro-Arc Oxidation(MAO)


Certified Strength

Every process for the MFP-02 is critical in order to produce the highest standard quality wheels. Under strong and safety condition, iPE provides ideal products for the consumers.

  • Radial Fatigue Tests

  • Rotary Fatigue Tests

  • Impact Fatigue Tests




{{end_tab_description}}

Design for track usage. The craftsmanship of MFV-L-02 is imponderous without sacrificing strength and safety. It weights in front at just 16.3 lbs / 7.4kg, rear at 21 lbs / 9.5 kg. It sets up an exciting chapter for iPE.


Forged Magnesium

Magnesium is the lightest structural metal available by far and it shows lower density, higher specific strength and exceptional machinability.

  • 30% lighter than forged aluminum by volume

  • 12% specific strength* stronger than aluminum

  • High damping capacity

  • Eco-friendly and recyclable





Innovation

Magnesium wheels are usually applied to race cars, and it can reduce unsprung mass, shorter braking distance, faster acceleration, and improve overall performance.

  • Unsprung mass deduction

  • Shock absorption for better handling

  • High thermal conductivity to prolonging life of brake system

  • Better fuel efficiency



World-Leading Manufacturing Process

  • 10,000-Tons Forging Press

  • Hot Flow Forming

  • Heat Treatment

  • CNC Turning

  • CNC Milling

  • Polish & Grinding

  • Micro-Arc Oxidation(MAO)


Certified Strength

Every process for the MFP-02 is critical in order to produce the highest standard quality wheels. Under strong and safety condition, iPE provides ideal products for the consumers.

  • Radial Fatigue Tests

  • Rotary Fatigue Tests

  • Impact Fatigue Tests

products.title: Nissan GT-R (R35)
products.bodyHtml:
The Nissan GT-R (R35), Nissan’s legendary supercar has been one of the most popular JDM sports cars with heritage in the earlier Skyline models. Designed and engineered to maximize performance and exhaust gas flow. With 31.39HP and 55.86Nm of torque increase, there are significant improvements on throttle responsiveness and smoother power band throughout the rev range. The iPE Exhaust System not only unleashes the unique exhaust sound from its VR38DETT engine, but also allows the car to be tuned to its full potential.This iPE exhaust system is handcrafted with T304 Stainless Steel reducing weight by 17%(-5.1kg).

iPE Valvetronic system for the Nissan GT-R (R35) allows users to adjust the exhaust note through OBD II Hand Gesture Control Sensor or Bluetooth Remote Control Module. Furthermore, we also offer various motorsport-inspired exhaust tip upgrade options.

Full Exhaust system:
Downpipe (Optional):
- 200 cell downpipe
- Catless downpipe

Catback Exhaust System:
1. Front pipe
2. Mid pipe
3. Valvetronic Muffler
4. Chrome Silver tips

Valvetronic Control system:
- Remote Control system
- Hand Gesture Control sensor (Optional)

Exhaust Tip Upgrade Options:
- Chrome Black tips
- Titanium Gold tips
- Titanium Blue tips

WARNING DISCLOSURE - Please read carefully prior to installation!

1.Improper adjustments made during installation may result in short-term or permanent damages to the iPE exhaust system and/or your vehicle. Please note, iPE will not be responsible for any damages to the vehicle, and warranties on iPE product(s) will be voided if the damages occurred due to improper installation.The warranty will also be voided in case of accidents, modifications, improper or competition uses. If you have any questions regarding installing an iPE exhaust system please contact the iPE authorized dealer you purchased from.

2. The manufacturer, importer or dealer shall not be liable for any incidental damage including personal injury or any other damages caused by improper installation or operation of the iPE exhaust system. When installing the iPE exhaust system, please ensure that the exhaust system does not make contact with wires that might cause it to melt.

3. iPE Exhaust guarantees full warranty of iPE exhaust systems for a total period of 1 year – starting from the date of purchase noted on the invoice. (Warranty is only applicable to exhaust systems purchased via iPE or iPE authorized dealers.)

All electronic components – 1 Year Warranty.

iPE 200 Cell High Flow Sport Cat Pipes – 1 Year Warranty.

Cat-bypass Pipes (Catless) - We recommend an ECU tune as we will NOT provide warranty for CEL (Check Engine Light) when changing to Cat-bypass Pipes.

iPE Exhaust Tips - We highly recommend users, DO NOT wash with strong acid and strong based organic solvent.

Warranties are non-transferable.

Warranty is limited to an exchange or repair of the defective part, full system will not be replaced unless required.

Warranty will not be applicable if the iPE exhaust system is purchased in a country where iPE is not authorized.

For more information regarding iPE warranty policy:
https://ipeofficial.com/pages/returns-warranty

Please note, all images shown on iPE’s website are for reference and illustration purposes only. Actual products may vary due to product enhancement or change. iPE reserves the right to revise, change, explain the product.

products.title: Nissan RZ34 400Z Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The Nissan RZ34 400Z continues Nissan’s legendary sports car tradition with high performance and precision engineering. The iPE Exhaust System, designed specifically for the RZ34 400Z, enhances exhaust flow, sound, and weight. Made from high-grade T304 stainless steel, the iPE system is durable and performance-enhancing. The iPE exhaust produces 91 dB with the valve closed and 110 dB with the valve open at 5000 RPM, compared to the stock system's 102 dB with the valve open. This results in an 8 dB increase, a 7.84% rise in sound intensity. 


The iPE Exhaust System for the Nissan RZ34 400Z not only boosts exhaust sound but also offers customizable appearance options, transforming the driving experience and showcasing Nissan's commitment to engineering excellence and performance.

products.title: Porsche 718 Cayman GT4 RS Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
Porsche 718 Cayman GT4 RS Full Exhaust System Product Description



    As the flagship model of the Porsche 718 family, The new Porsche 718 Cayman GT4 RS is the fastest, most powerful, and most expensive Porsche Cayman, and it appears to be part of a motorsport bloodline more than ever. So, we have once again intensified the elements that make a sports car: Performance, Handling and Sound.

      Our Full System package gets you the most out of your GT4 RS by increasing exhaust gas flow exit the exhaust system. This iPE exhaust system is a direct bolt-on system, available in Gr.1 Titanium or T304 Stainless Steel, reducing maximum weight by 44% (-9.8kg). Overall, providing significant enhancements in handling, throttle responsiveness and power curve all the way to redline.



*Please confirm whether your car has an “OPF system” before placing an order.

2. The manufacturer, importer or dealer shall not be liable for any incidental damage including personal injury or any other damages caused by improper installation or operation of the iPE exhaust system. When installing the iPE exhaust system be careful that the exhaust system does not touch other parts sensitive to high temperature.

The warranty is limited to defects recognized by our technical department and of normal use only, and excludes items subject to normal wear and tear(gaskets and damping wool). The warranty is voided in case of accidents, modifications, improper or competition uses.

The iPE Exhaust system for the Porsche 911 Carrera / 4 / S / 4S / GTS (992) is designed and engineered to enhance gas flow and maximize performance gain. 
Highlighting the exhaust note from its turbo-charged Flat-six engine. Turbo whistle is also noticeable. This iPE exhaust system is handcrafted with T304 Stainless Steel from headers to mufflers, reducing weight by 34% (-8.4kg).

products.title: Porsche 911 Carrera / 4 / 4S (996) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The Porsche 996 Carrera series refined with an iPE Innotech Performance Exhaust system generate an outstanding high-pitched racing sound as well as a comfortably quiet cruise by the push of a button when wished for. Our Valvetronic exhaust delivers both power and dynamic valve control to the driver's seat. The full system comes with a remote control module including 3 different modes: on, off, and auto. In on mode, the valves are fully open for maximum flow and power, releasing a breathtaking racing sound with an incomparable clean tone especially when accelerating. In off mode, the valves are closed and volume is reduced for a comfortable cruise. The auto mode enables the system to detect the engine rpm and gas pedal signal to automatically adjust the valve movements for a dynamic driving experience.
Each part of the exhaust system is individually designed to perfectly fit the Porsche 996 Carrera series. Our unique design overcomes the limits set by the stock exhaust, so that performance, sound, and driving pleasure can be increased dramatically, giving your Porsche unique supercar sound down-the-line.

All standard tips comes with chrome silver tips. Other colors are value-added.

WARNING - Please read these disclosures carefully prior to your installation!

1.Improper adjustments made during installation may result in short-term to permanent damages to the iPE exhaust system and/or your vehicle.
iPE will not be held responsible for any damages to the vehicle, and warranties on our products will be voided if the damages occurred due to improper installation.If you have any trouble installing the system please contact your authorized dealer!

2. The manufacturer, importer or dealer shall not be liable for any incidental damage including personal injury or any other damages caused by improper installation or operation of the iPE exhaust system. When installing the iPE exhaust system be careful that the exhaust system does not touch other parts sensitive to high temperature.

3. iPE makes no representation or warranties with regard to damage caused by the improper installation, use and maintenance of the iPE exhaust system. The warranty is limited to defects recognized by our technical department and of normal use only, and excludes items subject to normal wear and tear(gaskets and damping wool). The warranty is voided in case of accidents, modifications, improper or competition uses.

Actual product may vary due to product enhancement. iPE reserves the right to revise, change, explain the product.

products.title: Porsche 911 GT3 / GT3 RS (992) Catback System
products.bodyHtml:
Porsche 992 GT3 / GT3 RS Catback Exhaust System Product Description



      Porsche never disappoints when it comes to its GT series, as it is known as one of the most phenomenal driving machines. The iPE Catback System for the Porsche 911 GT3 / GT3 RS (992) is designed and engineered to bring joy to every second in the cockpit.

      This iPE exhaust system is a direct bolt-on system, available in Gr.1 Titanium or T304 Stainless Steel, reducing maximum weight by 40%(-5.8kg). Overall, providing significant enhancements in handling, throttle responsiveness and power curve all the way to redline.



Porsche 992 GT3 / GT3 RS Catback Exhaust System Product Details





      Featuring an X-pipe design and dual-resonators, the iPE exhaust highlights the 9,000 rpm symphony from its naturally aspirated Flat-Six engine.

       As the engine runs at extremely high temperatures, the heat shields featured on the dual-resonators prevents excessive heat from the engine, which may cause heat-soaks, hindering performance

      iPE Valvetronic Exhaust System for the Porsche 911 GT3 / GT3 RS (992) allows users to adjust the exhaust note through OEM Valve operation keeping daily usability. Furthermore, we also offer various new motorsport-inspired exhaust tips as an option.

products.bodyHtml:
The Porsche 997 GT3 / RS in combination with an iPE Innotech Performance Exhaust system excels in every imaginable aspect. products.title: Porsche 911 Turbo / Turbo S (996) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The Porsche 996 Turbo / S refined with an iPE Innotech Performance Exhaust system generate an outstanding high-pitched racing sound as well as a comfortably quiet cruise by the push of a button when wished for. Our Valvetronic exhaust delivers both power and dynamic valve control to the driver's seat. The full system comes with a remote control module including 3 different modes: on, off, and auto. In on mode, the valves are fully open for maximum flow and power, releasing a breathtaking racing sound with an incomparable clean tone especially when accelerating. In off mode, the valves are closed and volume is reduced for a comfortable cruise. The auto mode enables the system to detect the engine rpm and gas pedal signal to automatically adjust the valve movements for a dynamic driving experience.
Each part of the exhaust system is individually designed to perfectly fit the Porsche 996 Turbo / S. Our unique design overcomes the limits set by the stock exhaust, so that performance, sound, and driving pleasure can be increased dramatically, giving your Porsche unique supercar sound down-the-line.

All standard tips comes with chrome silver tips. Other colors are value-added.

products.title: Porsche 911 GT3 / GT3 RS (992) Full Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
Porsche 992 GT3 / GT3 RS Full Exhaust System Product Description



    The new Porsche 991 GT3 (992) is an even more phenomenal driving machine from Porsche’s GT series, and it appears to be part of a motorsport bloodline more than ever. So, we have once again intensified the elements that make a sports car: Performance, Handling and Sound.

      Our Full System package gets you the most out of your 992 GT3 by increasing exhaust gas flow exit the exhaust system. This iPE exhaust system is a direct bolt-on system, available in Gr.1 Titanium or T304 Stainless Steel, reducing maximum weight by 40% (-5.8kg). Overall, providing significant enhancements in handling, throttle responsiveness and power curve all the way to redline.


Porsche 992 GT3 / GT3 RS Full Exhaust System Product Details




      Featuring an X-pipe design and dual-resonators, the iPE exhaust highlights the 9,000 rpm symphony from its naturally aspirated Flat-Six engine.

      As the engine runs at extremely high temperatures, the heat shields featured on the dual-resonators prevents excessive heat from the engine, which may cause heat-soaks, hindering performance

      iPE Valvetronic Exhaust System for the Porsche 911 GT3 / GT3 RS (992) allows users to adjust the exhaust note through OEM Valve operation keeping daily usability. Furthermore, we also offer various new motorsport-inspired exhaust tips as an option.

products.title: Porsche 718 Boxster / Cayman / Boxster S / Cayman S / Boxster GTS / Cayman GTS (982) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
*Please confirm whether your car has an “OPF system” before placing an order.

DATA:

Before (Full stock system)

Valve off : 95dB

Valve on : 105dB

After

1. (iPE Headers with 200 Cell Sport cat + Front Pipe + Muffler)

Valve off : 102dB

Valve on : 114dB

2. (iPE Muffler Only)

Valve off : 97dB

Valve on : 108dB

3. (iPE Front Pipe + Muffler Only)

Valve off : 99dB

Valve on : 110dB



SIZE: Headers

iPE: Ø 44.5mm

Front Pipe iPE: Ø 63.5mm

Muffler iPE: Ø 63.5mm



iPE Header with 200 cell Cat = 8.49KG （OEM11.22KG
iPE Header with Cat-bypass = 6.04KG （OEM11.22KG）
iPE Front Pipe = SS 5.17KG / Ti 2.50KG (OEM 10.62KG)

iPE Total Weight = SS 26.36KG (-35%KG) / Ti 18.46KG (-55%KG) (OEM 39.97KG)

products.title: Porsche Cayenne S / Turbo (955) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The Porsche 955 Cayenne S / Turbo refined with an iPE Innotech Performance Exhaust system generates an excellent, powerful sound, but also allows for a comfortably quiet cruise by the push of a button when wished for.
Our Valvetronic exhaust delivers both power and dynamic valve control to the driver's seat. The full system comes with a remote control module including 3 different modes: on, off, and auto. In on mode, the valves are fully open for maximum flow and power, releasing a breathtaking sportive sound with an incomparable clean tone especially when accelerating. In off mode, the valves are closed and volume is reduced for a comfortable cruise. The auto mode enables the system to detect the engine rpm and gas pedal signal to automatically adjust the valve movements for a dynamic driving experience.
Each part of the exhaust system is individually designed to perfectly fit the Porsche 955 Cayenne.

WARNING - Please read these disclosures carefully prior to your installation!

products.title: Porsche Macan 2.0T (95B.1) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
*Please confirm whether your car has an “OPF system” before placing an order.

The Porsche NEW NEW Macan 2.0 T refined with an iPE Innotech Performance Exhaust system generates an excellent, powerful sound, but also allows for a comfortably quiet cruise by the push of a button when wished for. Our Valvetronic exhaust delivers both power and dynamic valve control to the driver's seat.
The full system comes with a remote control module including 3 different modes: on, off, and auto. In on mode, the valves are fully open for maximum flow and power, releasing a breathtaking sportive sound with an incomparable clean tone especially when accelerating. In off mode, the valves are closed and volume is reduced for a comfortable cruise. The auto mode enables the system to detect the engine rpm and gas pedal signal to automatically adjust the valve movements for a dynamic driving experience.
Each part of the exhaust system is individually designed to perfectly fit the Porsche NEW Macan 2.0 T.

* OPF model fits catback system ONLY.

*Materials

Here at iPE Exhaust we believe in the absolute best materials for every application, chosen
environment friendly by the Sandblasting 304 properties on our catback system. For the
Sand-blasting exhaust boutique, of course we also offer 304 stainless steel as an
alternative on other products. Every material has its own perfect application based on
weight, strength, heat resistance, and chemical stability.


Sand-blasting


We have developed our own proprietary for the enviroment friendly usage. Adding a layer of
sand to our catback system will reduce heat soak, and the same strength, heat resistance,
and chemical stability as the stainless steel.

All standard tips comes with chrome silver tips. Other colors are value-added.

products.title: Subaru BRZ (ZD8) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
Subaru BRZ (ZD8) Exhaust System Product Description



The iPE Exhaust system for the Subaru BRZ (ZD8) / Toyota GR86 (ZN8) is designed and engineered to enhance gas flow and maximize performance gain. Highlighting the sonorous exhaust note from its 2.4L I4 engine. This iPE exhaust system is handcrafted with T304 Stainless Steel throughout the Header back system to reduce weight by 5%(-1.2kg).

iPE Valvetronic system for the Subaru BRZ (ZD8) / Toyota GR86 (ZN8) allows users to adjust the exhaust note through OBD II Hand Gesture Control Sensor or Bluetooth Remote Control Module. Furthermore, we also offer various motorsport-inspired exhaust tip upgrade options.



WARNING - Prior to purchase, please confirm if your vehicle is an OPF version. Thank you.



Subaru BRZ (ZD8) Exhaust System Product Details



Header Back Exhaust system:
▶ Header Back Exhaust System:
    1. Front pipe
    2. Mid pipe-1
    3. Mid pipe-2
    4. Valvetronic Muffler
    5. Chrome Silver tips

▶ Valvetronic Control System:
    ▸ Remote Control system
    ▸ Titanium Blue tips

▶ Exhaust Tip Upgrade Options:
    ▸ Chrome Black tips
    ▸ Titanium Blue tips
    ▸ Carbon Fiber tips

products.bodyHtml:
*Please confirm whether your car has an “OPF system” before placing an order.

iPE Exhaust's GR Supra B58 products can be defined into four parts: cat pipe, front pipe, mid pipe and muffler. We provides two options of 200 cell cat pipe and catbypass. Threw a lower exhaust resistance, iPE brings higher performance and sound at high rpm. In addition, with valvetronic control system, the exhaust sound can switch between aggressive and silence.



Specification:

iPE A90 GR Supra 3.0T Exhaust specifications

Total weight (Full System):
OEM: 29.5 kg
iPE: 21.3 kg

Total weight (Catback):
OEM: 25 kg
iPE: 17.8 kg

Exhaust sound measurements:
OEM: 105 db
iPE Full Sytem: 123 db
iPE Catback System: 114 db


All standard tips comes with chrome-silver tips. Other colors are value-added.

2. The manufacturer, importer or dealer shall not be liable for any incidental damage including personal injury or any other damages caused by improper installation or operation of the iPE exhaust system. When installing the iPE exhaust system be careful that the exhaust system does not touch other parts sensitive to high temperature.

3. iPE makes no representation or warranties with regard to damage caused by the improper installation, use and maintenance of the iPE exhaust system. The warranty is limited to defects recognized by our technical department and of normal use only, and excludes items subject to normal wear and tear (gaskets and damping wool). The warranty is voided in case of accidents, modifications, improper or competition uses.

Actual product may vary due to product enhancement. iPE reserves the right to revise, change, explain the product.

products.title: Volkswagen Golf GTi (Mk7.5) Exhaust System
products.bodyHtml:
The Volkswagen Golf GTi (Mk7.5) and the other Golf series (GTis and Golf Rs) has been one of the most popular hatchbacks in the car community. The famous EA888 engine is now at its 3rd generation and continues to be one of the 2.0L turbo-charged engines with greatest tuning potential. The iPE Exhaust system is designed and engineered to enhance gas flow and maximize performance gain. Not to mention that it will help owners to get the car tuned to its full potential. Highlighting the angry sound from the EA888 Gen3. This iPE exhaust system is handcrafted with T304 Stainless Steel from Cat pipe all the way to the muffler to reduce weight by 22.4%(-5.9kg).

iPE Valvetronic system for the Volkswagen Golf GTi (Mk7.5) allows users to adjust the exhaust note through OBD II Hand Gesture Control Sensor or Bluetooth Remote Control Module. Furthermore, we also offer various motorsport-inspired exhaust tip upgrade options.

WARNING - Prior to purchase, please confirm if your vehicle is an OPF version. Thank you.
Full Exhaust system:
Downpipe (Optional):
- 200 cell downpipe
- Catless downpipe

Catback Exhaust System:
1. Mid pipe
2. Valvetronic Muffler
3. Chrome Silver tips

Valvetronic Control system:
- Remote Control system
- Hand Gesture Control sensor (Optional)

Exhaust Tip Upgrade Options:
- Chrome Black tips
- Titanium Blue tips
- Carbon Fiber tips

WARNING DISCLOSURE - Please read carefully prior to installation!

1.Improper adjustments made during installation may result in short-term or permanent damages to the iPE exhaust system and/or your vehicle. Please note, iPE will not be responsible for any damages to the vehicle, and warranties on iPE product(s) will be voided if the damages occurred due to improper installation.The warranty will also be voided in case of accidents, modifications, improper or competition uses. If you have any questions regarding installing an iPE exhaust system please contact the iPE authorized dealer you purchased from.

2. The manufacturer, importer or dealer shall not be liable for any incidental damage including personal injury or any other damages caused by improper installation or operation of the iPE exhaust system. When installing the iPE exhaust system, please ensure that the exhaust system does not make contact with wires that might cause it to melt.

3. iPE Exhaust guarantees full warranty of iPE exhaust systems for a total period of 1 year – starting from the date of purchase noted on the invoice. (Warranty is only applicable to exhaust systems purchased via iPE or iPE authorized dealers.)

All electronic components – 1 Year Warranty.

iPE 200 Cell High Flow Sport Cat Pipes – 1 Year Warranty.

Cat-bypass Pipes (Catless) - We recommend an ECU tune as we will NOT provide warranty for CEL (Check Engine Light) when changing to Cat-bypass Pipes.

iPE Exhaust Tips - We highly recommend users, DO NOT wash with strong acid and strong based organic solvent.

Warranties are non-transferable.

Warranty is limited to an exchange or repair of the defective part, full system will not be replaced unless required.

Warranty will not be applicable if the iPE exhaust system is purchased in a country where iPE is not authorized.

For more information regarding iPE warranty policy:
https://ipeofficial.com/pages/returns-warranty

Please note, all images shown on iPE’s website are for reference and illustration purposes only. Actual products may vary due to product enhancement or change. iPE reserves the right to revise, change, explain the product.

The iPE Exhaust system for the Volkswagen Golf R (Mk8) is designed and engineered to enhance gas flow and maximize performance gain. Highlighting the powerful exhaust note from its famous EA888 EVO4 engine. This iPE exhaust system is handcrafted with T304 Stainless Steel throughout the entire exhaust system to reduce weight by 19.6%(-5.7kg).
